content:
- Continued task 25 from TO BE VERIFIED, ran deep skeptical verification with broad parallel scans, and rewrote the task plan to Draft 2 with concrete deltas (guard scope narrowed to src/ha/e2e_*.rs, control/read split clarified, response status validation requirements).
- Executed NOW EXECUTE implementation: refactored src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs to remove direct DCS control mutations and controller shortcuts; all control actions now go through API endpoints and state assertions poll /ha/state.
- Added per-node API/debug contexts in fixture and switched to explicit step_once pumping for API/debug workers inside request helpers because ApiWorkerCtx::run is not Send under tokio::spawn in current_thread e2e.
- Added policy regression guard tests/policy_e2e_api_only.rs to fail on forbidden direct DCS/controller mutation patterns in src/ha/e2e_*.rs.
- Ran required gates successfully in order: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint. Stored logs and marker grep outputs under .ralph/evidence/story-rust-system-harness/25-task-enforce-e2e-api-only-control-no-direct-dcs/.
- Updated task 25 checklist/status to done with <passing>true</passing>, updated AGENTS.md learning, and ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh.
- Next immediate step before quitting: commit all workspace changes with required message format and include evidence/challenges summary.

- Ran progress_read for Choose-Task (no prior visible output), then parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md fully.
- Verified bug-first rule: all bug tasks show <passes>true</passes>/<passing>true</passing>; none pending with false.
- Verified meta-task exists (task 18) but there are active <passes>false</passes> tasks, so meta-task does not take precedence this cycle per rule.
- Enumerated all <passes>false</passes> tasks (23, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 33) and inspected each task file for hidden priority tags; none present.
- Chose .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/23-task-ha-admin-cli-over-api.md as most logical next task because it is unblocked and unlocks blocked task 30 (full black-box API/CLI e2e migration) while continuing the HA admin chain from completed task 22.
- Wrote only that path to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped immediately.

- Started by reading prior memory via .ralph/progress_read.sh and then loaded .ralph/current_task.txt, which points to task 23 (ha admin CLI over API).
- Confirmed task 23 was in initial state (not_started, no TO BE VERIFIED/NOW EXECUTE marker), so I stayed in planning phase only.
- Ran broad parallel exploration sweeps (well beyond 5 tracks) across Cargo.toml, src/api/{mod,controller,worker}.rs, config schema/defaults/parser, bdd tests, e2e HTTP helpers, and docs/task inventory to ground a concrete plan.
- Wrote a full Draft 1 implementation plan into .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/23-task-ha-admin-cli-over-api.md including architecture decisions, module-by-module edits, command tree, dependency plan, exit code mapping, and test strategy.
- Set task status to in_progress and added required terminal marker TO BE VERIFIED at end of file.
- Did not execute code changes/tests yet by design; next loop must do deep skeptical verification (16+ parallel tracks), alter at least one plan item, then flip marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- New PO mail requested: "Please set test bdd to run that all test command instead".
- Followed email cadence strictly: sent immediate ack, plan mail, subtask start/completion mails, in-progress status mails, blocker mail, and final summary mail.
- Located `test-bdd` in Makefile and changed it from bdd+single-e2e to full command:
  `PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES=1 cargo test --all-targets -- --include-ignored`.
- Started verification with `make test-bdd`; it invoked the expected command and ran through many tests but then effectively hung in `ha::e2e_multi_node::e2e_multi_node_real_ha_scenario_matrix` for >15 minutes.
- Interrupted the hung run and cleaned orphaned etcd/postgres processes from the e2e namespace.
- Because this looks like a real issue, used add-bug skill workflow and created `.ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-test-bdd-full-suite-hangs.md` with reproduction context and acceptance criteria.
- Next step for subsequent run: investigate the e2e hang/regression under the new full-suite `test-bdd` command and decide whether this is a test harness deadlock, expected duration regression, or an interaction with `--include-ignored`.
